# The Garden Guy - Business Summary

## Overview
**The Garden Guy** is a premier landscaping and water feature design business based in Phnom Penh, Cambodia. Founded and operated by Wade Trevor Barry, the company specializes in creating luxury fish ponds, koi sanctuaries, custom fountains, and high-end bespoke garden landscapes.

## Key Facts
* **Business Name:** The Garden Guy
* **Founder & Lead Designer:** Wade Trevor Barry (Master Gardener & Water Feature Designer)
* **Location:** Phnom Penh, Cambodia (Serving Phnom Penh and surrounding areas)
* **Website:** https://thegardenguycambodia.com
* **Phone:** +855 964 023287
* **Email:** wadetrevorbarry403@gmail.com
* **Telegram:** @The gardenguypp

## Core Services
### 1. Fish Ponds & Koi Gardens
* Design and construction of natural ecosystem ponds and Japanese-inspired koi ponds.
* Implementation of premium, high-clarity water filtration systems.
* Focus on organic, chemical-free, and wildlife-friendly environments.

### 2. Fountains & Water Sculpture
* Creation of contemporary fountains, bubbling urns, cascades, and reflective pools.
* Custom water features designed as living artworks.

### 3. Luxury Garden Landscaping
* Comprehensive garden design including planting schemes, hardscaping, and outdoor rooms.
* Tailored to the specific space and vision of the client.

## Pricing and Timelines
* **Project Cost:** Custom luxury fish ponds typically range from $15,000 to $50,000 USD or more, depending on size, materials, and complexity.
* **Installation Time:** Most projects are completed within 2 to 4 weeks. This includes excavation, liner/filter installation, rock work, and water cycling.

## Maintenance Services
The Garden Guy offers ongoing support including:
* Seasonal maintenance
* Pond cleaning
* Filter servicing

## Founder Background
Wade Trevor Barry has decades of experience, having studied horticulture and landscape architecture. He founded The Garden Guy to unite his passions for water, ecology, and sculptural form, dedicating his work to crafting living water features that bring gardens to life.
